ques: Look up the definition and pronunciation of the word "impeccable" and also find an example sentence using that word.
answer: Could not complete on the live site — dictionary.cambridge.org is blocked by a Cloudflare bot-verification challenge that the headless browser cannot pass. (For reference, "impeccable" /ɪmˈpek.ə.bəl/ means "perfect, with no mistakes or faults", e.g. "He had impeccable manners.")
